MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion for Attorney's Fees and Costs Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Robert Aaron, Esq. for Plaintiff/moving party: Peter K. Scott.
There were no appearances made on behalf of defendants.
After hearing and considering the testimony and evidence in support of Plaintiff's motion, the plaintiff's motion is granted as follows: attorneys' fees $15,505.00 and costs $485.00.
Order granting motion for attorneys' fees and costs, and Amended Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Robert S. Aaron, Esq. for Plaintiff: Peter K. Scott, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Groh Asset Management, Inc. and Montgomery Global Advisors V LLC.; as follows:
Principal $46,800.00
Interest $3,339.45
Total of $50,139.45
Attorney's Fees and Costs per Memo of Costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
